birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Da Fonseca |name-list-style=amp |publisher=Cambridge University Press |isbn=978-0-521-82502-3 |chapter-url=https://books.google.com/books?id=3W_TN0790vEC&pg=PA293}} It is found in Colombia and Ecuador, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Da Fonseca |name-list-style=amp |publisher=Cambridge University Press |isbn=978-0-521-82502-3 |chapter-url=https://books.google.com/books?id=3W_TN0790vEC&pg=PA290}} This somewhat Aratinga-like species is found in humid temperate highland forests, especially with Podocarpus, on the east Andean slope in Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru
